rationale: The citing paper analyzes FMCG sales effects of CMPs alongside concurrent price promotions and explicitly reports no postpromotion dip, while the cited paper is a core study on promotion-induced stockpiling and decomposition of postpromotion sales effects (consumption, switching, loyal acceleration, repeat purchases). Given this strong conceptual overlap in promotion dynamics mechanisms, the citation is plausibly substantive rather than a generic mention. The DOI match is exact (10.1509/jmkr.44.3.450).
